member.name: P:Hazina.AI.Compression.Interfaces.ITokenCounter.ProviderName
member.summary: Get the name of the provider this counter supports

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.Compression.Interfaces.ITokenCounter.CountTokens(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Count tokens in text for a specific model

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.Compression.Interfaces.ITokenCounter.CountTokens(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Count tokens across multiple text segments

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.Compression.Interfaces.ITokenCounter.SupportsModel(System.String)
member.summary: Check if this counter supports the given model

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.Compression.Interfaces.ITokenCounter.TruncateToTokenLimit(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Truncate text to fit within token limit

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.Compression.Models.CompressionOptions.ReservedSystemTokens
member.summary: Reserved tokens for system prompt and tools

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.Compression.Models.CompressionOptions.KeepRecentMessages
member.summary: Number of recent messages to always keep

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.Compression.Models.CompressionOptions.ProviderOrModel
member.summary: Provider or model name for token counting

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.Compression.Models.CompressionOptions.AvailableTokens
member.summary: Get available tokens for content (after reserves)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.Compression.Models.CompressionOptions.ForModel(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create default options for a specific model

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.Compression.Optimization.MessageHistoryOptimizer
member.summary: Optimizes conversation history by applying relevance scoring, deduplication, and intelligent truncation to fit within token budgets

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.Compression.Optimization.MessageHistoryOptimizer.Optimize(System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage},System.String,Hazina.AI.Compression.Models.CompressionOptions)
member.summary: Optimize message history to fit within token budget

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.Compression.Optimization.MessageHistoryOptimizer.SelectRelevantMessages(System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage},System.String,System.Int32,Hazina.AI.Compression.Models.CompressionOptions)
member.summary: Select messages based on relevance to current query

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.Compression.Optimization.MessageHistoryOptimizer.CalculateRelevanceScore(HazinaChatMessage,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage})
member.summary: Calculate relevance score for a message

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.Compression.Optimization.MessageHistoryOptimizer.TruncateToTokenLimit(System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage},System.Int32)
member.summary: Truncate messages to fit within token limit (from beginning, keeping most recent)

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.Compression.TokenCounting.ApproximateTokenCounter
member.summary: Approximation-based token counter for providers without specific tokenizers. Uses character/word-based heuristics calibrated for common LLMs.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.Compression.TokenCounting.TokenCounterFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating provider-specific token counters

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.Compression.TokenCounting.TokenCounterFactory.GetCounter(System.String)
member.summary: Get token counter for a specific provider or model
